name: Hospital KPI Dashboard Pro
shortDescription: Comprehensive hospital performance dashboard with 45+ KPI metrics, real-time bed occupancy tracking, and financial reporting.
description: A complete hospital performance management system designed for Ugandan and East African healthcare facilities. Track patient admissions, bed occupancy, revenue per bed, staff productivity, and clinical outcomes.
changelog: Added bed occupancy forecasting module and monthly trend charts
whatsInside: Executive summary dashboard with 12 key metrics
Staff productivity and patient ratio charts
Automated alert system for threshold breaches
fileCompatibility: Microsoft Excel 2016 or later (Windows & Mac). Some features require macros to be enabled.

faq.question: Which Excel version is required?
faq.answer: Works with Excel 2016 and above (including Excel 365). Mac users may lose some macro functionality.

faq.question: Can I add my hospital's logo?
faq.answer: Yes, the dashboard includes a branded header area where you can insert your logo.

name: Financial Model & Valuation Toolkit
shortDescription: Investment-grade financial modeling toolkit with DCF, LBO, M&A models, and automated sensitivity analysis.
description: Professional financial modeling suite. Includes DCF analysis, LBO models, M&A frameworks, and automated sensitivity analysis.
changelog: Added scenario analysis module with Monte Carlo simulation
whatsInside: DCF valuation model with terminal value calculation
Automated sensitivity analysis with tornado charts
Scenario manager with up to 12 scenarios
fileCompatibility: Microsoft Excel 2016 or later (Windows only). Requires macros and Analysis ToolPak.

faq.question: Is this suitable for investment banking?
faq.answer: Yes, built to investment banking standards with full DCF, LBO, and M&A capabilities.

faq.question: Does it work on Mac?
faq.answer: Excel for Mac supports most features, but some advanced macros may not function.

name: NGO Grant Management System
shortDescription: End-to-end grant management system with donor tracking, budget vs actual, and compliance reporting.
description: Complete grant management solution for non-profit organizations. Track multiple grants, manage donor relationships, generate USAID/EU/UN compliance reports.
changelog: Added donor contribution analysis and multi-currency support
whatsInside: Automated currency conversion (UGX, USD, EUR, GBP)
Grant expiry and reporting deadline alerts
fileCompatibility: Microsoft Excel 2016 or later (Windows & Mac). No macros required for basic functions.

faq.question: Does this support USAID reporting?
faq.answer: Yes, includes USAID, EU, and UN compliance report templates.

faq.question: Can I track multiple donors?
faq.answer: Yes, the system supports unlimited donors and grants.

name: School Administration Dashboard
shortDescription: Complete school management dashboard with student tracking, fee collection, and staff management.
description: Comprehensive school administration system. Manage student enrollment, track fee payments, monitor staff performance.
changelog: Added termly reporting module and parent communication tracker
whatsInside: Termly academic reports with grade analytics
fileCompatibility: Microsoft Excel 2016 or later (Windows & Mac). No macros required.

faq.question: Can I track fee payments from multiple terms?
faq.answer: Yes, the system tracks fees term by term with automatic arrears calculation.

name: Church Stewardship & Finance System
shortDescription: Church financial management system with tithe tracking, expense management, and annual budgeting.
description: Designed for churches. Track tithes and offerings, manage expenses by ministry, generate monthly financial reports.
changelog: Added multi-currency support for foreign donations
whatsInside: Monthly and annual budget vs actual reports

faq.question: Can multiple church branches use this?
faq.answer: Yes, the system supports branch-level tracking with consolidated reporting.

name: HR & Payroll Management System
shortDescription: Complete HR and payroll system with employee records, payroll processing, and leave management.
description: Professional HR management system. Manage employee records, process payroll with URA PAYE/NSSF calculations, track leave balances.
changelog: Updated URA tax tables for 2025/2026 financial year
whatsInside: Employee records database with document storage
Monthly payroll processing with PAYE/NSSF auto-calculation
fileCompatibility: Microsoft Excel 2016 or later (Windows only). Requires macros for payroll calculations.

faq.question: Does it handle PAYE?
faq.answer: Yes, with current URA tax rates including all reliefs and bands.

faq.question: Is NSSF included?
faq.answer: Yes, both employer and employee NSSF contributions are automatically calculated.

name: SME Business Budget & Forecast Pro
shortDescription: Professional budgeting and forecasting toolkit for SMEs with 3-statement model integration.
description: Purpose-built for SMEs. Create professional budgets, forecast revenue and expenses, manage cash flow with rolling forecasts.
changelog: Added cash flow forecasting and what-if scenario planner
whatsInside: Annual budget planner with monthly breakdowns
Revenue forecasting model with trend analysis
Cash flow statement with 12-month rolling forecast
Executive summary with key financial ratios

faq.question: Can I use this for a startup?
faq.answer: Absolutely. The toolkit works for both established SMEs and startups preparing their first budget.

name: Agriculture Farm Management System
shortDescription: Farm management system with crop tracking, livestock records, and harvest forecasting.
description: Comprehensive farm management solution. Track crop cycles, manage livestock, forecast harvest yields, and monitor farm finances.
whatsInside: Crop cycle planner with planting and harvest dates
Harvest yield forecasting and actual tracking

faq.question: Can I track multiple farms?
faq.answer: Yes, you can manage unlimited farms with separate sheets.
